headline: Why Cisco (CSCO) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of networking technology giant Cisco (NASDAQ:CSCO) fell 2.8% in the afternoon session after U.S. equities traded lower as escalating geopolitical tensions between the U.S. and Iran pushed oil prices above $100 a barrel, rattling investor confidence.

headline: MongoDB, Inc. (MDB) Appoints Ryan Mac Ban as Chief Revenue Officer
summary: MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDB) is one of the 8 Best Debt Free Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 24, 2026, MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ:MDB) appointed Ryan Mac Ban as Chief Revenue Officer, effective April 27. Ryan Mac Ban brings more than 20 years of experience, most recently serving as Chief Revenue Officer at Confluent, and previously […]
